index.name: Nifty Bharat Bond Index April 2030
index.methodology: Target Maturity — Roll-down AAA PSU bonds
index.description: Bharat Bond ETFs pioneered India's target-maturity fixed-income strategy — a landmark innovation for predictable fixed-income planning. Each ETF holds AAA-rated PSU bonds maturing around specified year (e.g., April 2030). Hold-to-maturity philosophy: if purchased at 7.5% yield and held to maturity, guaranteed 7.5% return regardless of interim interest rate volatility. Eliminates interest rate risk entirely for buy-and-hold investors. Cheapest debt product in India (0.0005% expense ratio = ₹50 per ₹1 crore AUM annually). Bonds include NHAI (highway construction), REC (rural electrification), PFC (power finance), NTPC (power generation), IRFC (rail capex), HUDCO (affordable housing) — all AAA-rated quasi-sovereign issuers. Investors receive both coupons (6.5-8.5% annually) and terminal maturity value at par. Ideal for goal-based planning: education corpus for 5-year child, marriage planning 10-year horizon, retirement corpus 15-year plan. Eliminates timing risk of reinvestment — each coupon reinvested at original yield locked at purchase.

holdings.name: NHAI (Natl Highways Auth)
holdings.description: NHAI AAA-rated bonds maturing 2029-30. Backed by Government of India. Funds National Highway construction programme. Sovereign-equivalent credit quality with slightly higher yield than G-Secs.

holdings.name: REC Ltd (Rural Electrification)
holdings.description: REC Ltd bonds rated AAA by CRISIL and ICRA. Funds rural electrification and renewable energy projects. 54EC capital gains bonds also issued. GoI owns 52.63% — implicit sovereign backing.

holdings.name: PFC (Power Finance Corp)
holdings.description: PFC AAA bonds. Largest infrastructure finance company for power sector. Funds generation, transmission, and distribution projects. GoI owns 55.99%. Strong NPA coverage ratios.

holdings.name: NTPC Ltd
holdings.description: India's largest power utility bonds. AAA-rated. NTPC expanding aggressively into solar (60 GW target by 2032). Green bonds also issued for renewable projects. Extremely safe with PSU backing.

holdings.name: Indian Railway Finance Corp
holdings.description: IRFC AAA bonds fund Indian Railways capital expenditure. IRFC leases rolling stock and infrastructure to Indian Railways which repays from budget allocation — zero credit risk model.

holdings.name: HUDCO (Housing & Urban Dev)
holdings.description: HUDCO AAA bonds fund affordable housing and urban infrastructure. PMAY (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana) projects financed. Government of India holds 81.78% stake.

holdings.name: Nabard
holdings.description: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development bonds. AAA-rated. Refinances cooperative and rural banks for agricultural lending. GoI + RBI hold 100% — zero default risk.

holdings.name: SIDBI
holdings.description: Small Industries Development Bank of India bonds. AAA-rated. Provides refinancing to banks and NBFCs lending to MSMEs. Government-owned development financial institution.

holdings.name: Exim Bank
holdings.description: Export-Import Bank of India bonds. AAA-rated. Funds India's export credit and project exports. Strategic importance in India's trade finance architecture. 100% GoI-owned.

holdings.name: Gas Authority (GAIL)
holdings.description: GAIL (India) Ltd bonds. AAA-rated. India's largest natural gas transmission and distribution company. Petrochemicals and city gas distribution. Navratna PSU under MoPNG.

index.name: Nifty Bharat Bond Index April 2033
index.methodology: Target Maturity — Roll-down AAA PSU bonds
index.description: Second series of Bharat Bond ETF targeting April 2033 maturity. Longer duration (7+ years) means higher yield and slightly more interest rate sensitivity than the 2030 series. Same ultra-safe AAA PSU bond universe. Ideal for investors targeting a specific financial goal around 2033 — retirement, child's education, or property purchase.

holdings.name: NHAI (Natl Highways Auth)
holdings.description: Longer-dated NHAI bonds maturing 2032-33. NHAI is executing the world's second-largest highway construction programme. Bharatmala Phase-I of 34,800 km. Zero sovereign default risk.

holdings.name: REC Ltd
holdings.description: REC longer-dated bonds at slightly higher yield than shorter series. Huge opportunity in India's 500 GW renewable energy target by 2030 — REC will fund a large portion of this capex.

holdings.name: PFC (Power Finance Corp)
holdings.description: PFC 2033-maturity bonds. GoI's revised estimates project India needing $500bn in power sector investment by 2030 — PFC and REC are primary funding channels. AAA stable outlook.

holdings.name: NTPC Ltd
holdings.description: NTPC's green bond series included. Company targeting 60 GW renewable capacity. Green bonds raise cheaper capital for solar/wind projects. S&P and Moody's rated investment grade.

holdings.name: Indian Railway Finance Corp
holdings.description: IRFC 2033-maturity bonds. Indian Railways ₹2.6 trillion annual capex plan fully funded through IRFC. Passenger and freight revenue supports repayment. Effectively sovereign-guaranteed.

holdings.name: HUDCO
holdings.description: HUDCO 2033 bonds fund Smart City projects, metro rail, affordable housing. Urban India investment pipeline is massive with 100 smart cities programme. GoI backing ensures AAA rating.

holdings.name: Nabard
holdings.description: NABARD longer-dated bonds. India's farm credit growth target: ₹20 lakh crore for FY24. NABARD refinancing supports Kisan Credit Cards, microfinance, and rural SHGs.

holdings.name: SIDBI
holdings.description: SIDBI 2033 bonds. India has 63 million MSMEs employing 110 million people. SIDBI's refinance operations are critical to this sector's formal credit access. GoI-owned DFI.

holdings.name: Exim Bank
holdings.description: Exim Bank 2033 bonds. India targeting $1 trillion exports by FY28 — Exim Bank credit lines to African and ASEAN nations are strategic geopolitical instruments.

holdings.name: NHB (Natl Housing Bank)
holdings.description: National Housing Bank bonds. NHB regulates all housing finance companies in India. Refinances HFCs (HDFC, LIC Housing) at concessional rates for affordable housing. RBI subsidiary.

name: Edelweiss Mutual Fund - BHARAT Bond ETF - April 2031

index.name: Nifty BHARAT Bond
index.description: NIFTY BHARAT BOND Index April 2031 comprises AAA-rated bonds of CPSEs (Central Public Sector Enterprises) maturing before April 2031. Issuers include NHAI, IRFC, PFC, REC, NTPC, NABARD and HUDCO. Target Maturity ETF: investor who holds to maturity receives the YTM (~7.3-7.5%) locked in at time of purchase. No reinvestment risk, no credit risk (government-backed issuers), predictable returns.

holdings.name: NHAI 7.11% 2031
holdings.description: National Highways Authority of India AAA-rated bond maturing 2031. NHAI bonds backed by Government of India guarantee. Fund National Highway development — 10,000+ km/year target. Zero default risk for all practical purposes.

holdings.name: Power Finance Corporation 2031
holdings.description: PFC (rated AAA by CRISIL & ICRA) bond maturing 2031. PFC lends to power sector projects — generation, transmission and distribution. Backed by Ministry of Power; part of India's power sector infrastructure financing.

holdings.name: IRFC 7.00% 2031
holdings.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation bond maturing 2031. IRFC borrows from markets and on-lends to Indian Railways at a spread — zero credit risk as it lends to sovereign. AAA-rated; core holding in target maturity bond ETFs.

holdings.name: REC Limited 2031
holdings.description: REC Limited (formerly Rural Electrification Corporation) AAA-rated bond. Funds power infrastructure lending — generation, transmission, rural electrification. Systemic importance ensures full government backing.

holdings.name: NTPC Ltd 2031
holdings.description: NTPC Ltd AAA-rated bond maturing 2031. India's largest power generator. Bond proceeds fund new thermal and renewable energy capacity addition. Maharatna PSU; guaranteed dividend payouts reinforce credit quality.

holdings.name: NABARD 2031
holdings.description: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) AAA bond. India's apex agricultural development bank. Funds rural credit, irrigation and cooperative bank refinancing. Backed by RBI + Government equity; quasi-sovereign issuer.

holdings.name: Cash & Liquid Assets
holdings.description: Residual cash and near-maturity bonds to manage flows as constituent bonds approach April 2031 target maturity date.

name: Edelweiss Mutual Fund - BHARAT Bond ETF - April 2032 - Growth

index.name: Nifty BHARAT Bond Index - April 2032
index.description: NIFTY BHARAT BOND Index December 2032 comprises AAA-rated CPSE bonds maturing before December 2032 — a target maturity debt ETF. Constituent PSU issuers (NHAI, IRFC, PFC, REC, NTPC, HUDCO) carry zero practical default risk. Investors who buy and hold till December 2032 earn the prevailing YTM (~7.4-7.6%) at purchase, making BBETF0432 a predictable fixed-maturity investment alternative to FDs.

holdings.name: NHAI 7.35% 2032
holdings.description: NHAI AAA bond maturing December 2032. Slightly longer duration than 2031 bonds, offering marginally higher yield. NHAI has never defaulted and carries implicit government guarantee via Ministry of Road Transport.

holdings.name: Power Finance Corporation 2032
holdings.description: PFC AAA bond maturing 2032. Power Finance Corporation is India's systemically important NBFC financing power sector capital expenditure. Rated AAA by both CRISIL and ICRA.

holdings.name: IRFC 7.15% 2032
holdings.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Bharat Bond constituent. IRFC is a 100% Ministry of Finance-owned entity that serves as the financing arm of Indian Railways. All bonds guaranteed by Government of India.

holdings.name: REC Limited 2032
holdings.description: REC Limited AAA bond for 2032 maturity. REC finances power sector lending across India with special focus on rural electrification. Navratna PSU; consistently profitable for 20+ years.

holdings.name: HUDCO 2032
holdings.description: Housing Urban Development Corporation (HUDCO) AAA bond. Finances affordable housing and urban infrastructure projects. Backed by Ministry of Housing & Urban Affairs. Key instrument for PM Awas Yojana funding.

holdings.name: NABARD 2032
holdings.description: NABARD Bharat Bond 2032 constituent. Quasi-sovereign issuer (RBI + Government of India stakeholders). Supports rural credit cooperatives, microfinance institutions and agricultural development banks.

holdings.name: Cash & Liquid Assets
holdings.description: Residual cash managed actively as bonds are rolled from December 2032 target. Invested in short-term G-Secs and tri-party repo.
